MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 503

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-10-2020 IN DEPT. 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE OF DECEMBER 14, 2020 IS VACATED. THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS DECEMBER 28, 2020 AT 11:15 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 503. LAST DAY PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36(F) IS JANUARY 8, 2021. MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR THURSDAY, DECEMBER 24, 2020 AT 9:00 A.M. IN 603. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (503)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Preference In Setting Case For Trial
Off Calendar Sep-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). No opposition filed. The trial date of December 14, 2020 is vacated. The new trial date is December 28, 2020 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is January 8, 2021. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the initial November 5, 2018 trial date.

Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than November 13, 2020. Responses to the demand are due no later than November 27, 2020. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Commissioner Pang Ly via electronic mail by, December 18, 2020 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, December 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
